statement.informal: Multiplication of two negative reals is a single F16 node by absorbing the sign: exp(log(−x) + log(−y)) = (−x)·(−y) = x·y when x, y < 0. Extends mul_one_node_positive to the negative quadrant. (with constant 0 promoted to a parameter k9)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem mul_of_negatives_one_node (k9 : ℕ) (x y : ℝ) (hx : x < k9) (hy : y < 0) :
    Real.exp (Real.log (-x) + Real.log (-y)) = x * y

tactics:
theorem mul_of_negatives_one_node (x y : ℝ) (hx : x < 0) (hy : y < 0) :
    Real.exp (Real.log (-x) + Real.log (-y)) = x * y := by
  have hxp : 0 < -x := neg_pos.mpr hx
  have hyp : 0 < -y := neg_pos.mpr hy
  rw [mul_one_node_positive (-x) (-y) hxp hyp]
  ring

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
